proof: function[T0: CommRing, T1](x0: T1 -> Ideal[T0], x1: T1) { spec_vanishing_family[T0, T1](x0, x1) = Spec.vanishing[T0](x0(x1)) }[R, I](family, i)
let w0: I satisfy { not p ∈ spec_vanishing_family[R, I](family, w0) }
function(x0: I) { p ∈ spec_vanishing_family[R, I](family, x0) }(w0)
function[T0: CommRing, T1](x0: T1 -> Ideal[T0], x1: T1) { spec_vanishing_family[T0, T1](x0, x1) = Spec.vanishing[T0](x0(x1)) }[R, I](family, i)
let w0: I satisfy { not bundled_ideal_subset[R](family(w0), p.point.as_ideal) }
let w0: Spec[R] satisfy { w0 ∈ indexed_intersection[Spec[R], I](spec_vanishing_family[R, I](family)) != w0 ∈ Spec.vanishing[R](ideal_indexed_sum[R, I](family)) }

goal: indexed_union[Spec[R], I](function(x0: I) { spec_vanishing_family[R, I](family)(x0).c }) = indexed_intersection[Spec[R], I](spec_vanishing_family[R, I](family)).c

proof: function[T0: CommRing, T1](x0: T1 -> Ideal[T0], x1: T1) { Spec.vanishing[T0](x0(x1)).c = spec_vanishing_compl_family[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[R, I](family, i)
function[T0: CommRing, T1](x0: T1 -> Ideal[T0], x1: T1) { spec_vanishing_family[T0, T1](x0, x1) = Spec.vanishing[T0](x0(x1)) }[R, I](family, i)

goal: spec_vanishing_compl_family[R, I](family) = function(x0: I) { spec_vanishing_family[R, I](family)(x0).c }
proof: exists(k0: I) { spec_vanishing_family[R, I](family, k0).c != spec_vanishing_compl_family[R, I](family, k0) }
let w0: I satisfy { function(x0: I) { spec_vanishing_family[R, I](family, x0).c }(w0) != spec_vanishing_compl_family[R, I](family, w0) }
function(x0: I) { spec_vanishing_family[R, I](family, x0).c = spec_vanishing_compl_family[R, I](family, x0) }(w0)

goal: indexed_union[Spec[R], I](spec_vanishing_compl_family[R, I](family)) = indexed_union[Spec[R], I](function(x0: I) { spec_vanishing_family[R, I](family)(x0).c })
proof: let w0: I satisfy { function(x0: I) { spec_vanishing_family[R, I](family, x0).c }(w0) != spec_vanishing_compl_family[R, I](family, w0) }
function(x0: I) { spec_vanishing_family[R, I](family, x0).c = spec_vanishing_compl_family[R, I](family, x0) }(w0)

goal: indexed_union[Spec[R], I](spec_vanishing_compl_family[R, I](family)) = indexed_intersection[Spec[R], I](spec_vanishing_family[R, I](family)).c
exists(k0: Ideal[R]) { indexed_union[Spec[R], I](spec_vanishing_compl_family[R, I](family)) = Spec.vanishing[R](k0).c }
proof: function(x0: Ideal[R]) { indexed_union[Spec[R], I](spec_vanishing_compl_family[R, I](family)) != Spec.vanishing[R](x0).c }(ideal_indexed_sum[R, I](family))
let w0: Ideal[R] satisfy { indexed_union[Spec[R], I](spec_vanishing_compl_family[R, I](family)) = Spec.vanishing[R](w0).c }

function[T0: CommRing](x0: Set[Spec[T0]]) { exists(k0: Ideal[T0]) { Spec.vanishing[T0](k0).c = x0 } = spec_zariski_open[T0](x0) }[R](indexed_union[Spec[R], I](spec_vanishing_compl_family[R, I](family)))
